name: memo-audio-transcribe
description: Offline audio transcription for MEMO: bootstrap venv + download Whisper small (CTranslate2) + write transcripts into 01_Inbox.

interface.longDescription: Transcribe local audio files (mp3/m4a/wav) offline using Whisper small (CTranslate2) and write transcript outputs into MEMO/01_Inbox.
defaultPrompt: Transcribe this mp3 into a Markdown transcript in MEMO inbox.
Turn this meeting recording into transcript.txt + transcript.md.
Batch transcribe these audio files and save outputs under 01_Inbox.
